notes: All 15 responses (across temps 0.1/0.4/0.7, reps 0-4) are remarkably consistent and accurate: every one correctly identifies all 6 components, the HTTPS + dual-gRPC protocols, the unlabeled DB connections, and the pink-oval databases, with zero hallucinations. The single universal miss is the dangling/phantom third gRPC branch from the API Gateway — the diagram's deliberate design quirk — which no response mentions; since none fabricate a false endpoint for it, this counts as omission rather than hallucination. Minor differentiators: a few responses call the green Auth/Worker boxes 'teal' (acceptable color imprecision), and some at t0.7 use 'box' rather than specifying 'rounded rectangle'. The t0.1 reps are slightly cleaner on shape/color detail; t0.7 rep0 trades structural detail for prose. I scored all at 8 (solid, captures most key details, minor omissions) since the phantom-line miss is a subtle trap and the responses are otherwise flawless.
